capability.name: Visual Materials
capability.description: This capability enables surface appearance through proper material definitions, physically-based rendering of materials in visualization systems and consistent material behavior across different rendering engines.

requirements.name: material-assignment
requirements.message: Each renderable GPrim must have a computed material bound to it

requirements.name: material-mdl-schema
requirements.message: MDL Shaders must standard OpenUSD shader source attributes to ensure compatibility.

requirements.name: material-preview-surface
requirements.message: Material attributes must comply with the UsdPreviewSurface specification to ensure consistent rendering and viewer compatibility.

requirements.name: material-bind-scope
requirements.message: Material bindings must use appropriate scope to ensure proper material assignment and inheritance.

requirements.name: material-mdl-source-asset
requirements.message: Material attributes must comply with the UsdPreviewSurface specification to ensure consistent rendering and viewer compatibility.

requirements.name: material-shader-inputs
requirements.message: Shader inputs must have correct types matching their shader specification to ensure proper material behavior and prevent runtime errors.

requirements.name: material-texture-colorspace
requirements.message: Each PBR texture channel must use the correct color space.

requirements.name: material-texture-maxsize
requirements.message: Texture dimensions must not exceed 16,384 pixels on either axis to ensure optimal performance and memory usage in simulation environments.
